# validation

```go
import "github.com/retr0h/osapi/internal/validation"
```

Package validation provides a shared validator instance.

<a name="Instance"></a>

## func [Instance](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/validation/validation.go#L118)

```go
func Instance() *validator.Validate
```

Instance returns the shared validator for registering custom validators.

<a name="RegisterTargetValidator"></a>

## func [RegisterTargetValidator](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/validation/target.go#L57-L59)

```go
func RegisterTargetValidator(lister AgentLister)
```

RegisterTargetValidator registers the valid_target custom validator and sets the
AgentLister it uses. Call this at API server startup after the job client is
created, or in test SetupSuite to inject a mock.

<a name="Struct"></a>

## func [Struct](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/validation/validation.go#L74-L76)

```go
func Struct(v any) (string, bool)
```

Struct validates a struct and returns the error message and false if invalid.

<a name="Var"></a>

## func [Var](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/validation/validation.go#L88-L91)

```go
func Var(field any, tag string) (string, bool)
```

Var validates a single variable against a tag string and returns the error
message and false if invalid. This is useful for path parameters that
oapi\-codegen does not generate validate tags for in strict\-server mode.

<a name="AgentLister"></a>

## type [AgentLister](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/validation/target.go#L40)

AgentLister returns active agents with their hostnames and labels.

```go
type AgentLister func(ctx context.Context) ([]AgentTarget, error)
```

<a name="AgentTarget"></a>

## type [AgentTarget](https://github.com/osapi-io/osapi/blob/main/internal/validation/target.go#L34-L37)

AgentTarget holds the routing\-relevant fields of an active agent.

```go
type AgentTarget struct {
    Hostname string
    Labels   map[string]string
}
```
